spec_match.rationale: Five Web Animations with chained delays expose overallProgress and the master bar averages their values, directly demonstrating the API across a multi-phase sequence.

interactive.rationale: Start and reset controls drive the sequence while the master bar, phase bars, percentage labels, status labels, and live readout cells update every frame.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The concept page and feature index both describe a phased loading workflow where overallProgress removes manual timer arithmetic.

edge_cases.rationale: Unsupported browsers use a Date.now fallback, and supported browsers now label delayed phases as waiting so the pre-active timing contribution is visible.

references.rationale: The see-also section now includes the mandatory ChromeStatus entry and the Web Animations 2 overall progress spec link.

design_system.rationale: The page now uses shared CSS variables, no raw color literals, no inline event handlers or style attributes, and no Unicode check-mark status glyphs.

summary: Resolved the progress-sequence critique by adding the required ChromeStatus and spec references, replacing raw hex colors with design tokens, removing inline handlers and status glyphs, and surfacing waiting delay states in the overallProgress readout.
